intro: Thyrsanthema araneosa, commonly known as the spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. The spider orchid has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
